summary: Goal 3C PR #315 implements TOMICS-HAF 2025-2C promotion and cross-dataset gate outputs.
Promotion and cross-dataset gates executed, but promotion remains blocked because only one compatible measured dataset is available.
decisions: Do not change shipped TOMICS defaults in Goal 3C; a shipped default change remains blocked until a separate explicit promotion-change task is approved after compatible cross-dataset evidence passes.
Goal 3C claim register conditions safe claims on metadata guardrails and blocks unsafe claims.
errors_resolved: RALPH control-plane state was realigned from stale Goal 3B/3B.5 text to Goal 3C PR #315 status.
new_procedures: For future RALPH work, verify .rah/state/status.json, .rah/plans/current_loop.md, .rah/memory/wakeup.md, and .rah/ralph/completion_report.md before claiming no missing items.
open_questions: RAH SessionStart/Stop hooks are not registered; this is an operational convenience warning, not a Goal 3C blocker.
